title: Silukku Marame Lyrics Paayum Puli Song Lyrics

vaayada va va va

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Silukku Marame?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of life.

What is the context of this song in the movie Paayum Puli?

This song is featured during a lively sequence that emphasizes happiness and togetherness among characters.

Who are the singers of Silukku Marame?

The song is sung by Divya Kumar and Shashaa Tirpathi.

When was Silukku Marame released?

The song was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Silukku Marame, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the joyous moments in the movie Paayum Puli. The lively beats and engaging lyrics evoke a sense of celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song highlights themes of happiness and togetherness, inviting listeners to embrace the joy of life. With its catchy rhythm, it resonates with audiences, encouraging them to dance and celebrate.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Silukku Marame from the movie Paayum Puli is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Divya Kumar and Shashaa Tirpathi. This upbeat track captures the essence of festivity, making it a perfect anthem for any celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it's sure to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: Silukku marame, Silukku marame, come and bloom, come and bloom. Sweetness is there, sweetness is there, come and join in the celebration.

Touching and letting go of fear, the place we touched has become cool. Desires have faded away, and paths have opened up. Wedding talks have come together, happiness is flowing, come and open your mouth.
You come, come, come, come, come.
Silukku marame, Silukku marame, come and bloom, come and bloom.

Baby, it is always true, people said I love you. Life is never a film, I say. It feels dirty and strange. You are the one for me, believe it. You are the one for me, just feel it. Let's fly into a world so divine.
What can I say to everyone? Who can lift me up? I will hide you by holding you tightly.

If I go with the flow of the river, what will you do to meet me? I will be like a water hen, I will merge with your heart. Oh, my desire, my girl, my beloved, even if the rain falls, my heart will not change.
Silukku marame, Silukku marame, come and bloom.
If I am caught in a trap, what will I do? I will lift you up and take you away. I will throw the trap down.
If a lion takes me away, what will you do to meet me? I will become the roaring tiger, I will rise in that realm. Oh, my little bird, I will join you in the yellow. Let's go to the water and dance.
Silukku marame, Silukku marame, come and bloom, come and bloom. Sweetness is there, sweetness is there, come and join in the celebration.

Touching and letting go of fear, the place we touched has become cool. Desires have faded away, and paths have opened up. Wedding talks have come together, happiness is flowing, come and open your mouth.
You come, come, come, come, come.
